content_body: Absolutely LOVED Rustic Elegance! The home was beautifully decorated, impressive construction, and had all the amenities a renter would need! Hot tub, game area, indoor swinging chairs, gorgeous views, screened in porch, fire pit, outdoor living area where we ended our day with a fire and movie...you name it. We didn't want to leave! Would highly recommend Rustic Elegance and Cabin Rentals of Georgia! We would definitely rent again.
title: Expectations Exceeded
